description: Evidence from code-to-code MHD eigenvalue benchmarks and from violating Kumar's H1-H5 constraints to see the framework break in the predicted way.

next_steps.description: Identify a measurement that, if it landed at a value contrary to this idea's prediction within Numerical eigenvalue benchmarks and constraint-violation tests, would force a rewrite. Document what such a measurement would look like and which device could perform it.
